grant_and_term.grant: Right and license to use Concept and Proprietary Rights solely in operation of ProColor Collision Center
renewal_conditions: Not in default of FA or any other agreement with franchisor/affiliates
Sign franchisor's then-current FA (may have different financial and other terms)
Execute general release (excluding state franchise law claims)
Remodel to current standards; make required capital expenditures
grant_and_term.holdover: At-will, terminable by franchisor on 30 days notice, subject to all other FA terms

fee_and_payment_obligations.initial_fee: $20,000 (reduced to $10,000 for existing franchisee or multi-purchase)
fee_and_payment_obligations.monthly_franchise_fee_new: Greater of $2,000 or 3% of Gross Sales
fee_and_payment_obligations.monthly_franchise_fee_conversion: Monthly Base Fee (greater of $2,000 or 1.5% of Monthly Base Volume) + Monthly Growth Royalty (3% of excess over Monthly Base Volume)
fee_and_payment_obligations.conversion_example: If Annual Base Volume = $1.8M, Monthly Base Volume = $150K. On $170K monthly sales: Base Fee = $2,250 (1.5% × $150K) + Growth Royalty = $600 (3% × $20K) = $2,850 total
fee_and_payment_obligations.marketing_fund: 0.75% of Gross Sales (max 1% with majority approval)
fee_and_payment_obligations.franchisor_discount_right: Reserves right to discount fees for certain markets or multi-unit operators (Section 7.3)
fee_and_payment_obligations.tax_obligations: All amounts exclusive of applicable taxes; franchisee pays all sales/GST/VAT taxes

bookkeeping_and_audit.record_keeping: System per franchisor specifications; books kept at premises or principal office for 6 years
bookkeeping_and_audit.monthly_reporting: Gross Sales statement by 10th of each month
bookkeeping_and_audit.annual_reporting: Financial statements and tax returns on request
bookkeeping_and_audit.audit_rights: At any time without notice; complete access to books and records
bookkeeping_and_audit.audit_penalty: If understatement ≥2%: franchisee pays audit costs including accountant fees, travel, compensation

training_and_operational_obligations.initial_training: Must complete within 60 days of signing, before opening. Failure = possible termination
training_and_operational_obligations.additional_training: Mandatory at franchisor discretion; must attend conventions
training_and_operational_obligations.training_costs: Travel/living at franchisee expense; franchisor does not charge for initial training
training_and_operational_obligations.improvement_assignment: Section 9.6: All suggestions/improvements automatically assigned to franchisor without compensation. Irrevocable assignment of copyrights, trademarks, and other rights
training_and_operational_obligations.feedback_license: Section 11.12: All feedback may be used by franchisor without liability or compensation. Irrevocable, non-exclusive, perpetual, royalty-free, worldwide license granted
training_and_operational_obligations.corporate_image: Must conform to specifications; maintain appearance; replace worn fixtures/equipment
training_and_operational_obligations.operations_manual: Loaned, not owned. Must comply with all mandatory terms. Franchisor may modify at sole discretion
training_and_operational_obligations.capital_expenditure_risk: Section 11.10: Franchisor may require modifications that necessitate capital expenditures during term. No limits on frequency or cost. Franchisee accepts risk of significant unknown costs that may not be amortizable over remaining term
training_and_operational_obligations.inspection_rights: Section 11.11: Franchisor may enter and inspect at any time; interview customers
training_and_operational_obligations.insurance_program_participation: Section 11.6: Must participate in ALL insurance, fleet, national account programs
training_and_operational_obligations.customer_satisfaction: Section 11.8: Must comply with franchisor satisfaction measurement methods; franchisor can conduct on franchisee's behalf at franchisee's expense

ethics_and_insurance_work.accurate_estimates: Must prepare true and accurate estimates
ethics_and_insurance_work.hazardous_materials: Must use qualified suppliers for collection/removal
ethics_and_insurance_work.no_subcontracting: Cannot sub-contract services except to other ProColor franchisees
ethics_and_insurance_work.insurer_eligibility: Section 12.5: Representations and warranties that franchisee, operator, owner, and employees are eligible for insurance work. No blacklisting, no criminal convictions (excluding juvenile), no lawsuits with insurance providers
ethics_and_insurance_work.employee_restriction: Cannot employ anyone who cannot make same insurer eligibility representations
ethics_and_insurance_work.breach_consequence: Immediate termination without opportunity to cure

purchasing_obligations.approved_suppliers_only: All goods/services from franchisor or approved/designated sources
purchasing_obligations.paint_supplier_exception: Existing vendor agreement: may continue but 1.6% Gross Sales admin fee
purchasing_obligations.parts_sourcing: 85% from designated suppliers; noncompliance → plan → 1% Gross Sales fee
purchasing_obligations.supplier_relationship: Must not prejudice supplier relationships; must pay all bills promptly
purchasing_obligations.supplier_payment_default: Franchisor may deduct from Insurers Account without notice to pay suppliers
purchasing_obligations.franchisor_retains_rebates: Section 13.4: Franchisor entitled to collect and retain ALL discounts, volume rebates, admin fees, commissions, advertising allowances from suppliers. Also entitled to markup and profit on sales to franchisee

technology_obligations.software: Must acquire licenses from franchisor-designated vendors; accept all updates/upgrades
technology_obligations.ccc_one: Mandatory; 36-month minimum. Franchisor may change designated vendor
technology_obligations.attorney_in_fact: Section 14.2: Conversion franchisee appoints franchisor as attorney-in-fact to direct CCC ONE to transfer accounts
technology_obligations.data_access: Section 14.3: Franchisor can independently access all electronic information and data and use it in any manner without compensation
technology_obligations.no_independent_web_presence: Section 14.4: No websites, social media, hashtags, profiles, accounts referring to franchisor or system

non_curable_defaults_immediate: Loss of right to occupy premises or lease breach (25.2)
non_curable_defaults_written_notice: Criminal act or indictable offense by franchisee/officers/owners adversely affecting goodwill (25.2)
Gross Sales understatement 2+ times in 12 months (25.2)
Default under any other agreement with franchisor (25.2)
termination_triggers_and_cure.curable_defaults: 30 days to cure (5 days for monetary defaults) (25.3)
termination_triggers_and_cure.opening_deadline_failure: 90 days for conversion, 180 days for new build — franchisor retains all amounts (25.3.2)

post_termination_obligations.cease_operations: Stop operating under the Concept and Marks
post_termination_obligations.stop_using_marks: Immediately cease all use of Trademarks and Proprietary Rights
post_termination_obligations.return_materials: Return Operations Manual and all confidential information
post_termination_obligations.deidentify: Remove all signs, distinctive items containing Marks
post_termination_obligations.cancel_registrations: Assign or cancel telephone numbers, CCC ONE accounts, websites, domain names
post_termination_obligations.pay_all_amounts: Pay all outstanding fees and obligations
post_termination_obligations.insurers_account: $15,000 retained as deposit for 18 months for warranties and unpaid amounts

transfer_restrictions.franchisor_assignment: Section 23.1-23.2: No restriction on franchisor's right to assign
transfer_restrictions.franchisee_transfer: Section 23.3: Requires franchisor approval for any transfer of FA, business, or ownership interest
transfer_conditions: Sign new FA for remaining term (may have different fees/territory)
Sign general release (subject to state law)
Appoint franchisor as attorney-in-fact for CCC ONE transfer
transfer_restrictions.right_of_first_refusal: Section 24: Franchisor can match any offer for business or controlling interest

noncompete.during_term: No involvement in collision repair or franchise system/banner/chain related to car collision industry
noncompete.operator_noncompete: Operators must sign confidentiality and noncompete agreements

guaranty.scope: All obligations of franchisee under FA
guaranty.who_must_sign: Each individual with direct or indirect ownership interest designated by franchisor
guaranty.unlimited: Guaranty is of ALL obligations — no cap disclosed
guaranty.spousal_guaranty: Not explicitly required but all 'owners' must sign

liquidated_damages.notes: No explicit liquidated damages clause found in FA. Minnesota state addendum prohibits liquidated damages.

dispute_resolution.mediation: Required first step; location selected by mediator
dispute_resolution.arbitration: If mediation fails; venue: Minneapolis, Minnesota
dispute_resolution.cost_shifting: Franchisee bears all costs if franchisor secures relief or successfully defends
dispute_resolution.limitation_of_actions: Subject to state law (MN addendum: must comply with Minn. Stat. 80C.17, Subd. 58)

insurance_requirements.additional_insured: Franchisor must be named additional insured on all policies
insurance_requirements.notice_of_changes: 30 days advance notice of any cancellation/nonrenewal/change
insurance_requirements.evidence_timing: 10 days before operating, annually, on any change, or upon request
insurance_requirements.franchisor_remedy: May obtain coverage on franchisee's behalf and charge costs

indemnification.scope: Any and all claims arising from operation of ProColor Collision Center
indemnification.includes: All costs, expenses, damages, losses, liabilities, attorneys' fees

force_majeure.notes: No explicit force majeure clause found in the Franchise Agreement

distinctive_or_unusual_clauses.description: All suggestions for operational improvements automatically assigned to franchisor without compensation. Assignment of copyrights, trademarks, and all rights.
Any modification to FA accepted by 80% of ProColor Collision Centers is binding on all franchisees, regardless of individual consent.
No limits on frequency or cost of future modifications. Franchisee accepts risk of significant unknown costs that may not be amortizable over remaining term.
Breach of insurer eligibility representations triggers immediate termination without cure opportunity. Extends to all owners, operators, and employees.
Franchisor can deduct from Insurers Account without notice to pay franchisee's unpaid suppliers.
Franchisor can independently access all electronic information and data and use it in any manner without compensation or contractual limitation.

distinctive_or_unusual_clauses.clause: Franchisor Retains All Supplier Benefits — Section 13.4
distinctive_or_unusual_clauses.description: Franchisor entitled to collect and retain ALL discounts, volume rebates, commissions, advertising allowances from suppliers, plus markup and profit on goods sold to franchisee.
Franchisee may not withhold payment on grounds of franchisor's alleged non-performance. Franchisor may withhold from Insurers Account if franchisee is delinquent.
